hero.title: Discover Premium
hero.subtitle: Products
hero.description: Experience exceptional quality and modern design. Shop our curated collection of premium products crafted for the modern lifestyle.

featuredProducts.title: Featured Products
featuredProducts.subtitle: Discover our most popular items, carefully selected for their exceptional quality and customer satisfaction.

categories.title: Shop by Category
categories.subtitle: Find exactly what you're looking for in our organized categories

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.description: Subscribe to our newsletter and be the first to know about new products, exclusive offers, and special promotions.
newsletter.privacy: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe at any time.

testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it - hear from our satisfied customers

questions.howToGetSubscription: How to get your subscription after payment?
questions.howToGetSubscriptionAnswer:
💳 After completing the payment process, a page will appear with our WhatsApp number.
📲 Please message us immediately on WhatsApp, and we will activate your subscription directly and quickly via your email.
⚡ Activation is instant and guaranteed!
questions.problemWithSubscription: What if I encounter a problem with my subscription later on?
questions.problemWithSubscriptionAnswer: ✅ We offer a full guarantee throughout the subscription period.

products.title: Products
products.noProductsFound: No products found matching your criteria.

cart.title: Shopping Cart
cart.emptyDescription: Looks like you haven't added anything to your cart yet.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.orderErrorDescription: There was an error placing your order. Please try again or contact support.

auth.signInExisting: sign in to your existing account
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.passwordResetSent: We've sent a password reset link to {email}

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Please describe your inquiry in detail...
contact.messageSentDescription: Thank you for contacting us. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

thankYou.title: Thank you for your order!
thankYou.description: We've successfully received your order. We'll be in touch shortly with your account details and next steps.

returns.title: Returns & Exchanges
returns.subtitle: We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. If you're not happy with your order, we're here to help with our hassle-free return policy.
returns.startReturnDesc: Log into your account and select the item you want to return
returns.printLabelDesc: Print the prepaid return shipping label we provide
returns.packShipDesc: Pack the item securely and drop it off at any shipping location
returns.getRefundDesc: Receive your refund within 5-7 business days after we receive your return
returns.exchangesDesc: We currently don't offer direct exchanges. If you need a different size, color, or model, please return your original item and place a new order for the item you want.
returns.proTipDesc: To ensure you get the item you want quickly, place your new order first, then return the original item. This way, you won't have to wait for the return to be processed.
returns.internationalDesc: International customers can return items within 30 days of delivery. Please note:
returns.returnShippingCost: Return shipping costs are the customer's responsibility for international orders
returns.returnWarehouse: Items must be returned to our US warehouse
returns.customsDuties: Customs duties and taxes are non-refundable
returns.customsProcessing: Processing may take 10-14 business days due to customs clearance
returns.damagedItemsDesc: If you receive a damaged or defective item, please contact us immediately. We'll provide:
returns.importantDesc: Please take photos of damaged items and packaging before returning. This helps us improve our packaging and shipping processes.
returns.needHelpDesc: Our customer service team is here to help with any return questions:

shipping.title: Shipping Information
shipping.subtitle: We offer fast, reliable shipping options to get your order to you quickly and safely.
shipping.freeShippingDesc: Enjoy free standard shipping on all orders over 10000 DA. No promo code needed - the discount is automatically applied at checkout.
shipping.freeShippingApplies: Applies to standard shipping within the continental US
shipping.freeShippingTotal: Orders must total 10000 DA or more before taxes
shipping.freeShippingExcludes: Excludes oversized items and special delivery requirements
shipping.freeShippingCombined: Cannot be combined with other shipping promotions
shipping.processingTimeDesc: All orders are processed within 1-2 business days. Orders placed after 2 PM EST will be processed the next business day.
shipping.preOrderDesc: Ships on or before the estimated date
shipping.intlShippingDesc: We ship to over 100 countries worldwide. International shipping rates and delivery times vary by destination.
shipping.customsResponsibility: Customs duties and taxes are the responsibility of the recipient
shipping.deliveryExtended: Delivery times may be extended due to customs processing
shipping.productsRestricted: Some products may be restricted in certain countries
shipping.intlCustomersDesc: For the most accurate shipping costs and delivery estimates, add items to your cart and enter your shipping address at checkout.
shipping.orderTrackingDesc: Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking number via email. You can track your package using:
shipping.trackingWays: Your account dashboard on our website
shipping.trackingLink: The tracking link in your shipping confirmation email
shipping.signRequired: Someone must be available to sign for packages over 50000 DA
shipping.doorDelivery: Packages may be left at your door for standard deliveries
shipping.apartmentDelivery: Apartment deliveries require access to the building
shipping.poBoxDelivery: PO Box deliveries are available for small items only
shipping.deliveryIssuesDesc: If you experience any delivery issues, please contact us within 48 hours:
shipping.deliveredNotReceived: Package marked as delivered but not received
shipping.whiteGloveDesc: Available for large or fragile items
shipping.holdPickupDesc: Have packages held at carrier facility
shipping.holdPickupFeatures: Available at FedEx and UPS locations
shipping.restrictionsDesc: Please note the following shipping restrictions:
shipping.remoteAreas: Remote or rural areas (additional fees may apply)
shipping.shippingSupportDesc: Need help with shipping questions or issues?

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceDesc: By accessing and using this website, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provision of this agreement. If you do not agree to abide by the above, please do not use this service.
terms.licenseDesc: Permission is granted to temporarily download one copy of the materials on Store's website for personal, non-commercial transitory viewing only. This is the grant of a license, not a transfer of title, and under this license you may not:

licenseItems.commercial: Use the materials for any commercial purpose or for any public display
licenseItems.reverse: Attempt to reverse engineer any software contained on the website
licenseItems.remove: Remove any copyright or other proprietary notations from the materials

terms.productsDesc: We strive to provide accurate product information, including descriptions, prices, and availability. However:

productItems.colors: Product colors may vary due to monitor settings
productItems.errors: We reserve the right to correct any errors in pricing or product information
productItems.availability: Product availability is subject to change without notice
productItems.quantities: We may limit quantities available for purchase

terms.orderAcceptanceDesc: All orders are subject to acceptance by us. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order for any reason, including but not limited to product availability, errors in product or pricing information, or suspected fraudulent activity.

paymentItems.due: Payment is due at the time of order
paymentItems.accept: We accept major credit cards and PayPal
paymentItems.prices: All prices are in USD unless otherwise specified
paymentItems.taxes: You are responsible for any applicable taxes

terms.shippingDesc: Shipping times and costs vary based on your location and selected shipping method. We are not responsible for delays caused by shipping carriers or customs processing.
terms.returnsDesc: Please see our Returns Policy for detailed information about returns, exchanges, and refunds.
terms.accountsDesc: When you create an account with us, you must provide accurate and complete information. You are responsible for:

accountItems.confidential: Maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials
accountItems.activities: All activities that occur under your account
accountItems.unauthorized: Notifying us immediately of any unauthorized use
accountItems.current: Ensuring your account information remains current

terms.prohibitedDesc: You may not use our service:

prohibitedItems.unlawful: For any unlawful purpose or to solicit others to perform unlawful acts
prohibitedItems.violate: To violate any international, federal, provincial, or state regulations, rules, laws, or local ordinances
prohibitedItems.infringe: To infringe upon or violate our intellectual property rights or the intellectual property rights of others
prohibitedItems.harass: To harass, abuse, insult, harm, defame, slander, disparage, intimidate, or discriminate
prohibitedItems.false: To submit false or misleading information

terms.liabilityDesc: In no event shall Store or its suppliers be liable for any damages (including, without limitation, damages for loss of data or profit, or due to business interruption) arising out of the use or inability to use the materials on Store's website, even if Store or a Store authorized representative has been notified orally or in writing of the possibility of such damage.
terms.governingDesc: These terms and conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of [Your State/Country] and you irrevocably submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts in that state or location.
terms.changesDesc: We reserve the right to revise these terms of service at any time without notice. By using this website, you are agreeing to be bound by the then current version of these terms of service.
terms.contactInfoDesc: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:
terms.address: Address: 123 Commerce Street, Business City, BC 12345

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.personalInfoDesc: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, make a purchase, subscribe to our newsletter, or contact us. This may include:

personalItems.contact: Name and contact information (email address, phone number, mailing address)
personalItems.payment: Payment information (credit card details, billing address)

privacy.autoCollectionDesc: When you visit our website, we automatically collect certain information about your device and usage, including:

autoItems.pages: Pages visited and time spent on our site

privacy.useDesc: We use the information we collect to:

useItems.updates: Send you updates about your orders and account

privacy.sharingDesc: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your information in the following circumstances:

sharingItems.providers: Service Providers: With trusted third-party service providers who help us operate our business
sharingItems.legal: Legal Requirements: When required by law or to protect our rights
sharingItems.transfers: Business Transfers: In connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets
sharingItems.consent: With Your Consent: When you explicitly agree to share your information

privacy.securityDesc: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. These measures include:

rightsItems.access: Access and update your personal information
rightsItems.delete: Request deletion of your personal information
rightsItems.copy: Request a copy of your data
rightsItems.object: Object to processing of your personal information

privacy.rightsContact: To exercise these rights, please contact us at privacy@store.com or use the contact information provided below.
privacy.cookiesDesc: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze site traffic, and personalize content. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences.
privacy.changesPolicyDesc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the 'Last updated' date.
privacy.contactDesc: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:
privacy.addressPrivacy: Address: 123 Commerce Street, Business City, BC 12345

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
